description: Index of all item compendium files for the 5e 2024 rules set. Each entry describes a file containing structured item records.

files.description: Simple and martial weapons including SRD base weapons and common magic weapons (+1/+2/+3 variants, Flame Tongue, Frost Brand, Sword of Life Stealing).
All SRD armor types (light, medium, heavy) plus generic +1/+2/+3 armor templates.
Standard shield, +1/+2/+3 shields, and Animated Shield.
Common adventuring equipment: torches, rope, backpack, rations, healer's kit, crowbar, and other standard gear.
Artisan tools, thieves' tools, specialty kits (herbalism, poisoner's, disguise, forgery, navigator's), gaming sets, and musical instruments.
Healing potions (healing to supreme), resistance potions, speed, flying, invisibility, giant strength, and clairvoyance.
Spell scrolls from cantrip through 9th level. Each scroll allows casting the stored spell once.
Magic wands with charge-based spell casting: Magic Missiles, Fireballs, Lightning Bolts, Web, Fear, and others.
Magic staffs with charge-based spell lists: Staff of Fire, Frost, Power, the Magi, and Healing.
Magical rods: Rod of the Pact Keeper (+1/+2/+3), Rod of Absorption, Rod of Lordly Might, Rod of Rulership.
Magic rings: Protection, Spell Storing, Fire Resistance, Feather Falling, Invisibility, and others.
Wondrous items: Bag of Holding, Cloak of Protection, Headband of Intellect, Amulet of Health, Gauntlets of Ogre Power, Boots of Speed, Necklace of Fireballs, and others.
DM-created homebrew items. Currently includes the Thunder Mage Quarterstaff +3 with placeholder spell list for DM review.
files.notes: TODO entries in granted_spells must be verified by the DM before play.

granted_spells_format.description: Each granted_spell entry should be a structured object.

example.name: Fireball
example.description: Expend 3 charges to cast fireball (save DC 17).
